transcript.detail: Wrote src/permissions.ts with full implementation following spec precedence.

Verified that canAccessProject correctly handles: suspended users block all access (SPEC-004), cross-org denial (SPEC-006), explicit deny override (SPEC-005), temporary project grants (SPEC-007), same-org owner edit (SPEC-001), org admin edit (SPEC-002), viewer read-only (SPEC-003), and precedence order as defined in README.
